title: sideroxylon altamiranoi
intro: Sideroxylon altamiranoi, also known as the Altamirano's tree or Pouteria altamiranoi, is a species of evergreen tree native to Hawaii and the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Sideroxylon altamiranoi are primarily found in its bark, which contains tannins, saponins, and other bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as the common cold and flu. Sideroxylon altamiranoi can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
